LanguageData.ARA_HoneyProduction.label: Honeypot
LanguageData.ARA_HoneyProduction.description: Represents how much Arachne Honey Pure Puree this creature stores. When other Zerg are hungry, creatures with honeypot chambers will try to feed them; if the honeypot is overflowing, creatures will try to extract it.
LanguageData.ARA_HoneyProduction_Animal.label: Honeypot
LanguageData.ARA_HoneyProduction_Animal.description: Represents how much Arachne Honey Pure Puree this creature stores. If the honeypot is overflowing, organisms will try to extract it.
LanguageData.ARA_ChitinArmor.label: carapace
LanguageData.ARA_ChitinArmor.description: Represents the thickness of Arachne's carapace on this creature. The thicker the carapace, the more powerful the Zerg's defense. Zerg can also strip it off their bodies to produce chitin.
